subject: [CDS] Modify blueprints-processor services to use common template
commit_message:
[CDS] Modify blueprints-processor services to use common template

CDS Blueprints processor uses 3 ports (http, grps and cluster),
previously they were based on custom service yaml and now
all 3 are based on common customizableService.

Issue-ID: OOM-3110
Change-Id: Ib57f882401cb3b3ae3a4ebbebbf841e6d8fba0e6
Signed-off-by: Marek Szwałkiewicz <marek.szwalkiewicz@external.t-mobile.pl>
